# **CRC cards** {#crc-cards}

**Enum:**

| Class Name: Genre |  |
| :---- | :---- |
| **Parent Class (if any):** None **Subclasses (if any):** None |  |
| **Responsibilities:** List different Genres and their associated display name. | **Collaborators:**  None |

| Class Name: RequestStatus |  |
| :---- | :---- |
| **Parent Class (if any):** None **Subclasses (if any):** None |  |
| **Responsibilities:** List different status of values of the book request. | **Collaborators:**  None |

| Class Name: ReservationStatus |  |
| :---- | :---- |
| **Parent Class (if any):** None **Subclasses (if any):** None |  |
| **Responsibilities:** List different status of values of the reservation. | **Collaborators:**  None |

**Entities:**

| Class Name: User (abstract) |  |
| :---- | :---- |
| **Parent Class (if any):** None **Subclasses (if any):** Librarian, Renter |  |
| **Responsibilities:** Store user information (username, password, name, email). | **Collaborators:**  None |

| Class Name: Librarian |  |
| :---- | :---- |
| **Parent Class (if any):** User **Subclasses (if any):** None |  |
| **Responsibilities:** Store attributes and permissions specific to librarians. | **Collaborators:**  None |

| Class Name: Renter |  |
| :---- | :---- |
| **Parent Class (if any):** User **Subclasses (if any):** None |  |
| **Responsibilities:** Store attributes and permissions specific to Renters | **Collaborators:**  None |

| Class Name: Book |  |
| :---- | :---- |
| **Parent Class (if any):** None **Subclasses (if any):** None |  |
| **Responsibilities:** Store all book attributes (title, author, ISBN, genre, availability). | **Collaborators:**  Genre |

| Class Name: CheckoutReceipt |  |
| :---- | :---- |
| **Parent Class (if any):** None **Subclasses (if any):** None |  |
| **Responsibilities:** Store all attributes corresponding to a checkout receipt, including the user and book, the date the book was checked out, the due date, date book was returned, and fine amount associated with that checkout. | **Collaborators:**  User Book  |

| Class Name: Reservation |  |
| :---- | :---- |
| **Parent Class (if any):** None **Subclasses (if any):** None |  |
| **Responsibilities:** Store all attributes corresponding to a reservation, including the state of the reservation,  | **Collaborators:**  User Book ReservationStatus |

| Class Name: BookRequest |  |
| :---- | :---- |
| **Parent Class (if any):** None **Subclasses (if any):** None |  |
| **Responsibilities:** Store all data regarding a Book Request submitted by a renter, including the title, author, user, status and optional notes, and also date requested. | **Collaborators:**  RequestStatus User |

**Repositories:**

| Class Name: BookRepository |  |
| :---- | :---- |
| **Parent Class (if any):** JpaRepository (interface) **Subclasses (if any):** None |  |
| **Responsibilities:** Store and manage a collection of Book objects. Provide methods for finding a book based on specific attributes. Provide methods for adding/removing books. | **Collaborators:**  Book |

| Class Name: UserRepository |  |
| :---- | :---- |
| **Parent Class (if any):** JpaRepository (interface) **Subclasses (if any):** None |  |
| **Responsibilities:** Store and manage a collection of User objects. Provide methods for finding a user based on specific attributes. Provide a method for adding Users. | **Collaborators:**  User |

| Class Name: CheckoutReceiptRepository |  |
| :---- | :---- |
| **Parent Class (if any):** JpaRepository (interface) **Subclasses (if any):** None |  |
| **Responsibilities:** Store and manage a collection of CheckoutReceipt objects. Provide methods for finding a CheckoutReceipt based on User or Book. Provide a method for adding a new receipt to DB. | **Collaborators:**  CheckoutReceipt ReservationRepository User Book |

| Class Name: BookRequestRepository |  |
| :---- | :---- |
| **Parent Class (if any):** JpaRepository (interface) **Subclasses (if any):** None |  |
| **Responsibilities:** Store and manage a collection of BookRequest objects. Provide methods for finding a BookRequest based on Requestor(Renter), Status, date requested, and by request id. | **Collaborators:**  BookRequest User RequestStatus |

| Class Name: ReservationRepository |  |
| :---- | :---- |
| **Parent Class (if any):** JpaRepository (interface) **Subclasses (if any):** None |  |
| **Responsibilities:** Store and manage a collection of Reservation objects. Provide methods for finding a Reservation based on User, Book or Status (or combination). | **Collaborators:**  Reservation |

**Controllers:**

| Class Name: BookController |  |
| :---- | :---- |
| **Parent Class (if any):** None **Subclasses (if any):** None |  |
| **Responsibilities:** Loading the books detail page for a specific book Calling CheckoutService when a user clicks on the checkout button on the page Display correct availability for a book Provide option for a user to Reserve an unavailable book Allow librarian to check in book | **Collaborators:**  BookService CheckoutService UserService ReservationService |

| Class Name: HomeController |  |
| :---- | :---- |
| **Parent Class (if any):** None **Subclasses (if any):** None |  |
| **Responsibilities:** Responsible for loading the home page using appropriate services (loading the book list using BookService). Routing clicks on books to the appropriate book details page. | **Collaborators:**  BookService  |

| Class Name: RegistrationController |  |
| :---- | :---- |
| **Parent Class (if any):** None **Subclasses (if any):** None |  |
| **Responsibilities:** Handle the User registration form submission Validates User;s input data(email format, password strength and match) Redirects to Home page on successful registration | **Collaborators:**  UserService Renter |

| Class Name: AuthenticationController |  |
| :---- | :---- |
| **Parent Class (if any):** None **Subclasses (if any):** None |  |
| **Responsibilities:**  Display the log in form page | **Collaborators:**  SecurityConfig |

| Class Name: UserDetailsController |  |
| :---- | :---- |
| **Parent Class (if any):** None **Subclasses (if any):** None |  |
| **Responsibilities:** Gets currently logged in User’s data Gets checkout receipts for currently logged in user | **Collaborators:**  User CheckoutReceipt |

| Class Name: BookRequestController |  |
| :---- | :---- |
| **Parent Class (if any):** None **Subclasses (if any):** None |  |
| **Responsibilities:** Display Book Request form. Handle book request form submission(validating data in the form, creating BookRequest) Display User’s(Renter’s) book requests Display Book Requests management page for the librarian(calculating the stats, filtering requests) Handle approve book requests Handle reject book requests | **Collaborators:**  BookRequest Request Status User BookRequestService UserService |

| Class Name: LibrarianConsoleController |  |
| :---- | :---- |
| **Parent Class (if any):** None **Subclasses (if any):** None |  |
| **Responsibilities:** Handle adding Books Handle removing Books Display Pending Book Requests | **Collaborators:**  BookRequest Request Status User BookRequestService BookService UserService |

**Services:**

| Class Name: BookService |  |
| :---- | :---- |
| **Parent Class (if any):** None **Subclasses (if any):** None |  |
| **Responsibilities:** Handle search queries of books. Provide methods for adding/removing books. | **Collaborators:**  Book BookRepository |

| Class Name: CheckoutService |  |
| :---- | :---- |
| **Parent Class (if any):** None **Subclasses (if any):** None |  |
| **Responsibilities:** Manage book checkouts and checkout extensions for renters. Handle check-ins when librarians process returns. Update availability status of Books. Manage reservations of books by renters.  | **Collaborators:**  BookRepository CheckoutReceiptRepository User, Renter Book |

| Class Name: UserService |  |
| :---- | :---- |
| **Parent Class (if any):** UserDetailsService **Subclasses (if any):** None |  |
| **Responsibilities:** Provides User CRUD operations Implements UserDetailsService for authentication Loads User by email for login Determines User’s role for authorization | **Collaborators:**  User UserRepository PasswordEncoder |

| Class Name: BookRequestService |  |
| :---- | :---- |
| **Parent Class (if any):** None **Subclasses (if any):** None |  |
| **Responsibilities:** Saves the BookRequests into the repository Retrieve BookRequests(all, by status, by requestor) Approve and Reject the book requests Delete a BookRequest | **Collaborators:**  BookRequest RequestStatus User BookRequestRepository |

| Class Name: ReservationService |  |
| :---- | :---- |
| **Parent Class (if any):** None **Subclasses (if any):** None |  |
| **Responsibilities:** Manage book reservations. Change status of reservation when it is created, when book is returned and when reservation is fulfilled or expired. Provide methods for querying reservations based on Book, User, or ReservationStatus, or combination. | **Collaborators:**  ReservationRepository User Book ReservationStatus |

**Configuration:**

| Class Name: SecurityConfig |  |
| :---- | :---- |
| **Parent Class (if any):** None **Subclasses (if any):** None |  |
| **Responsibilities:** Configures the authentication and authorization systems Configures the log in processes Configures successful log in redirect Configures the log out logic Configures public and protected URL’s | **Collaborators:**  SpringSecurity UserService AuthenticationController |

# **Description of system interaction with the environment**  {#description-of-system-interaction-with-the-environment}

### Operating Environment: {#operating-environment:}

* **Operating System:** Cross-platform (Windows, macOS, or Linux)  
* **Development Environment:** Eclipse IDE for Enterprise Java Developers  
* **Programming Language:** Java 17  
* **Framework:** Spring Boot (version 3.x)  
* **Build Tool:** Maven  
* **Browser Support:** Any modern web browser (e.g., Chrome, Firefox, Edge) can be used to access the web interface.

### Data Storage: {#data-storage:}

- Data is stored using Springboot H2 Database.   
- In the file system it is actually stored in data/librarydb.mv.db file

### External Dependencies {#external-dependencies}

- Thymeleaf – for rendering server-side HTML templates that display dynamic content.  
- H2 Database  
- Spring Security

### Assumptions and constraints: {#assumptions-and-constraints:}

- The system assumes a single active local deployment (no distributed or concurrent multi-user setup).  
- Network connectivity is not required, since the application runs fully offline on localhost.

# **Architecture of the system** {#architecture-of-the-system}

![][image1]

# **Dealing with errors**  {#dealing-with-errors}

### Input and User Errors: {#input-and-user-errors:}

Examples: Invalid login credentials.  
Handling:

- Inputs are validated and Controllers catch exceptions such as InvalidInputException or BookNotFoundException and return messages that will be displayed to the user (e.g., “Book not available”, “Invalid credentials”).  
- Controllers validate inputs using Jakarta Bean Validation (@Valid, @NotBlank, @Email, @Size)

### Business Logic Errors {#business-logic-errors}

Examples: Trying to check out a book that’s already checked out, or reserving a book twice.  
Handling:

- CheckoutService and ReservationService validate all operations before performing updates.  
- Violations throw custom exceptions, caught by controllers and shown as alerts.  
-
